w:r.w:t: Read-only access to the live eBay listing mirror (

) if it's ever shared beyond its intended integration, and update this doc.
Same login flow as any user — POST credentials, get back a bearer JWT (24h expiry per
field on the login response is a legacy display value and reads
— the actual enforced permission set comes from the RBAC role assignment, not this field. Confirm the real scope with
K. Southern Cross Auto Parts - AU
, which it doesn't have) — the table above is provided here as reference since it can't discover store IDs on its own. Use
from this table with the endpoints below.
All three support the same filters/pagination —
Verified response (production, live data — 314,076 published listings total):
"2026 Kia Carnival Auto Trans Differentialträger Lagerscheibe 458493B628"
"Fewer than 3 images — add more for better conversion"
returns the next 3 distinct rows (verified — no overlap with page 1).
matches the filter (K. Salvage Auto Parts, 71,512 listings on that store):
There's also a store-first route with the same filtering/pagination, scoped by path segment instead of query param:
Identical result shape and totals — verified against the same store above (
is the eBay Inventory API offer identifier (present on listings synced via the Inventory API path; legacy Trading-API-synced listings have
and can only be found by
"2015 Jeep Cherokee Junction Block Cover Gebraucht OEM 68202821AA"
